$orderId..write: auth != null && (auth.uid === $uid || (!data.exists() && root.child('shops/' + $uid + '/settings/acceptingOrders').val() !== false && newData.child('customerUid').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('customerName').isString() && newData.child('customerName').val().length > 0 && newData.child('customerPhone').isString() && newData.child('paymentMethod').isString() && newData.child('createdAt').isString() && newData.child('items').hasChildren() && newData.child('total').isNumber() && newData.child('total').val() >= 0 && newData.child('status').val() === 'pending' && !newData.hasChild('paymentVerified') && !newData.hasChild('paymentVerifiedBy') && !newData.hasChild('paymentVerifiedAt') && !newData.hasChild('slipRef') && !newData.hasChild('saleRecorded') && !newData.hasChild('source')))

$phone..write: auth != null && data.exists() && root.child('shops/' + $uid + '/settings/loyaltyBeanGoal').exists() && newData.child('beans').val() === data.child('beans').val() - root.child('shops/' + $uid + '/settings/loyaltyBeanGoal').val() && newData.child('beans').val() >= 0 && newData.child('redeemedCount').val() === (data.child('redeemedCount').exists() ? data.child('redeemedCount').val() : 0) + 1 && newData.child('phone').val() === data.child('phone').val() && newData.child('name').val() === data.child('name').val() && newData.child('lifetimeBeans').val() === data.child('lifetimeBeans').val() && newData.child('createdAt').val() === data.child('createdAt').val()
